generated_oml:
instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor-mounted position encoder for measuring motor shaft angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder behind gearbox for measuring output shaft angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current (IM) to the permanent magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InputCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
]

instance GearboxAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxPositionEncoder
]

instance InputCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angle data from motor position encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler, CppProgrammingEnabler, JavaProgrammingEnabler
]

instance GearboxAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angle data from gearbox position encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler, CppProgrammingEnabler, JavaProgrammingEnabler
]

instance InputCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Input current (IM) data from motor current sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InputCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler, CppProgrammingEnabler, JavaProgrammingEnabler
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor driving the first axis (current IM as input, torque τM as output); safety constraints: working range [-90°,90°], max speed |q̇max|=75°/s"
]

instance GearTransmission : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gear transmission component handling torque τG"
]

instance CycloidalGear : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gear component handling torque τout"
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840dSLController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840d sl CNC controller managing axis control via position, speed, or acceleration inputs"
]

instance SysMLModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for systems modeling across abstraction levels (requirements, functional architecture, logical architecture, product/technical layer)"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataVisualizationService, MotionAccuracyOptimizationService
]

instance RFLPMethodologyEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RFLP (Requirements, Functions, Logics, Physics) methodology for system decomposition"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataVisualizationService, MotionAccuracyOptimizationService
]

instance OOSEMMethodologyEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataVisualizationService, MotionAccuracyOptimizationService
]

instance SPESMethodologyEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SPES methodology for system decomposition"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataVisualizationService, MotionAccuracyOptimizationService
]

instance SMArDTMethodologyEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SMArDT methodology for system decomposition"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataVisualizationService, MotionAccuracyOptimizationService
]

instance ACMEArchitectureEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACME Architecture Description Language for component & connector modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataVisualizationService, MotionAccuracyOptimizationService
]

instance AADLArchitectureEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AADL Architecture Description Language for component & connector modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataVisualizationService, MotionAccuracyOptimizationService
]

instance MontiArcArchitectureEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc Architecture Description Language for component & connector modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataVisualizationService, MotionAccuracyOptimizationService
]

instance SimulinkSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for analytical models of friction dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:enables MotionAccuracyOptimizationService
]

instance CppProgrammingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for implementing dashboard interface and behavior description"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataVisualizationService
]

instance JavaProgrammingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Java for implementing dashboard interface and behavior description"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataVisualizationService
]

instance SysMLStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML IBDs for structural representation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]

instance ACMEArchitectureModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACME model for component & connector architecture"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACMEArchitectureEnabler
]

instance AADLArchitectureModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "AADL model for component & connector architecture"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AADLArchitectureEnabler

    DTDFVocab:inputTo MontiArcArchitectureEnabler

    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler

    DTDFVocab:inputTo MontiArcArchitectureEnabler

    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler

    DTDFVocab:inputTo CppProgrammingEnabler

    base:desc "Java implementation for analytical models"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo JavaProgrammingEnabler

instance RealTimeDataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data visualization through dashboard interface"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataVisualizationAction
]

instance MotionAccuracyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimizes motion accuracy by modeling and simulating friction dynamics in the robot's first axis"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyOptimizationAction
]

instance DataVisualizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Real-time dashboard visualization of sensor data and model outputs"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MotionAccuracyOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusting control inputs to minimize motion errors based on friction dynamics simulation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MABIMAX100Robot : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Serial robot MABI MAX 100 with six axes for precision manufacturing applications"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, GearTransmission, CycloidalGear, SiemensSINUMERIK840dSLController, MotorPositionEncoder, GearboxPositionEncoder, MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "No virtual to physical interaction occurs; the digital shadow functions as a passive entity with a one-way data flow, thus no control commands, validation, feedback, or execution confirmation mechanisms are present."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is validated through comparison of simulated data against measured data to detect friction loss in the robot's first axis. Data traceability ensures all data is linked to its origin and computational method, enabling integrated dashboard visualization. Accuracy limitations exist for high-precision applications, as the system is less precise than traditional machine tools."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol is used for streaming sensor data (time series) from physical components, with the Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller managing physical system interfaces."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with industry standards including SysML [17], ACME [23], AADL [24], and MontiArc [25], [26] for architecture description and system modeling, ensuring interoperability among heterogeneous modeling tools and stakeholder perspectives."
]
